reviews.review_description: I mainly use my quest3 to watch movies and this is the most immersive, it wasn’t working for a few months but is fine now. It also doesn’t play as many video formats as Big Screen and in those instances I use Big Screen. Also all the movies I watch are saved locally.

reviews.review_title: Freezes will not play local files
reviews.review_description:
Plays streaming online VR content well. Freeze when I try to open list of local files. Probably can't handle indexing a couple thousand video clips.
Edit: Works well with interactive script sites that are supported. Runs out of memory on my Quest 2 and freezes in local mode due to large number of video clips. If I delete the number clips to a few dozen it works. No support for XBVR or Stash or SMB and DLNA networking.
After reducing the video clips to a couple dozen, the files will list but none will launch when clicked on.
So usless for playback of local files.
i need to open app without controller. please give eye click and hand track function. require controller all time is too inconvenient.

Pros: streams 8K well; logs you back in to last URL for resumed sessions; pretty interface.  Cons: logs you out if you change URLs and doesn't seem to store URLs or passwords other than current site, so using with more than one website is painful, which seems strange since it is recommended by a group of VR sites that sell a multi-site pass and you cannot easily use it with more than one.  Would be a great viewer if they fixed that issue and made it so you could easily move between sites.
Cant login says wrong password or username even tho they are correct
Works great! Best video app around.
Works well with my local videos and it's easy to use.
